# iAd

**Framework**

The Apple Search Ads iAd Attribution API is a legacy framework for attributing app data that originates from Apple Search Ads campaigns on iOS devices.

## Overview



Attribution data consists of campaign metadata from app ads, such as app downloads and redownloads that result from taps on ads created through the Apple Search Ads user interface or the Apple Search Ads API.

All Apple Search Ads data that Apple collects is subject to the [https://www.apple.com/privacy].

## Essentials

- **iAd Changelog**: Learn what’s new in the Apple Search Ads iAd Attribution API.
- **Setting Up Apple Search Ads Attribution**: Retrieve the attribution dictionary.
- **ADClient**: The parent class you use to request an attribution response.

## Attribution Errors

- **ADClientErrorDomain**: The error domain that passes to the completion handler.
- **ADClientError**: The group of error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler block.
- **ADClientError.Code**: The error codes that pass from the attribution response to the completion handler.

## Deprecated

- **Deprecated Symbols**: Reference symbols from the legacy iAd framework.
